name: Chocolate Turtle Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cake mix, oil, melted butter, water, and half of the condensed milk in a large bowl until well blended.
2. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13 pan and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
3. In a double boiler, melt caramels with the remaining half of the condensed milk (about 15-20 minutes).
4. Pour the caramel sauce over the warm cake layer and sprinkle with chopped pecans.
5. Pour the remaining batter on top and bake for an additional 30 minutes or until the top springs back when touched.
6. For frosting, combine butter, evaporated milk, cocoa in a large bowl and bring to a boil.
7. Add confectioners' sugar and vanilla; beat until smooth.
8. Spread the frosting evenly over the cooled cake.
9. Optional: Decorate with whole pecans before serving.
